'''Jace Paol''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
He was [[Bria Tharen]]'s second-in-command of [[Red Hand Squadron]], under the title of [[Chief/Legends|chief]],<ref name="CE">{{CSWECite|2|11|Paol, Jace}}</ref> and followed [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Tharen on her diplomatic stints, as well as participating in the [[Capture of the Helot's Shackle|capture]] of the [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']] and the [[Battle of Ylesia]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]], along with the rest of Red Hand Squadron, on [[Toprawa/Legends|Toprawa]] while attempting to beam the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] plans to [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] aboard the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
